app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: He waihona huli  Ľia o nńĀ  Ľike kŇćkua kino, me ka AI ma ke  Ľalua, e kope wikiwiki ai i loko o nńĀ hŇć Ľike lima
search.label: E wehewehe i kńĀu mea i  Ľike ai
search.placeholder: e.g. pihi pani modal,  Ľa Ľohe inoa kŇćkua kino
search.hint_live: HŇć Ľike  Ľia nńĀ hopena i kńĀu kńĀkau  Ľana.
search.hint_submit: E kńĀkau i ka wehewehe a kaomi Huli a i  Ľole Enter.
search.hint_platform: Ke hŇć Ľike nei i nńĀ  Ľike {platform}.

results.no_results_announce: ĽAohe hualoa Ľa no '{query}'. E ho ĽńĀ Ľo i ka inoa o kahi  ĽńĀpana, ka  Ľano kiko Ľńę, a i  Ľole he  ĽŇćlelo  Ľńď a Ľe.
results.no_results_body: E ho ĽńĀ Ľo i ka inoa o kahi  ĽńĀpana (e.g. 'button'), ka  Ľano kiko Ľńę (e.g. 'input'), a i  Ľole he  ĽŇćlelo  Ľńď a Ľe.
detail.location_placeholder: p.h. NńĀ wahi ńĀpau: / KńĀ Ľei: / NńĀ  Ľao Ľao kiko Ľńę huahana:
detail.rem_label: NńĀ ka Ľina hana ho Ľoponopono
detail.refine_hint_ai: E wehewehe i ka mea e ho Ľololi ai a e kńĀkau hou a ho Ľohui ai ka AI i ńĀu mau ho Ľololi a nńĀ kiko Ľńę. E ho Ľololi i kńĀu hi Ľohi Ľona AI a i  Ľole e ho Ľopau i kńďia ma
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: E ho Ľoponopono pololei i nńĀ pahu ma luna, a i  Ľole e kńĀkau i nńĀ loli ma  Ľane Ľi. E hŇć ĽńĀ i ka AI ma
detail.refine_hint_no_ai_suffix: a e kńĀkau hou  Ľo ia e ho Ľokumu ana i kńĀu mau  ĽŇćlelo.
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: p.h. no ka pŇęnaewele kelepona wale, he tooltip ka mea
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: La Ľana: "Loa Ľa nńĀ loiloi o ka pae ko Ľiko Ľi Nui e like me kńďia ma ke ka Ľina Ho Ľomaka. He manawa e loa Ľa ai nńĀ pilikia pae ha Ľaha Ľa ma hope o ko lńĀkou ho Ľoponopono  Ľia."
detail.rewriting_aria: Ke ho Ľoponopono nei me ka AI
detail.rewrite_aria: E mńĀlama i ka memo a e ho Ľoponopono i nńĀ kahua i koho  Ľia me ka AI
detail.nothing_to_copy_heading: ĽA Ľohe mea e kope ai
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: Ua hakahaka kńďia pahu.  ĽA Ľohe mea e kope ai.
detail.confirm_reset_body: Ua ho Ľololi nui  Ľoe i kńďia kikokikona. Ke ho Ľiho Ľi  Ľia, e wehe  Ľia nńĀ ho Ľololi ńĀpau ńĀu i hana ai.

settings.ai_enable_label: HŇć ĽńĀ i ka kŇćkua AI
settings.ai_enable_desc: Ho Ľoponopono ana i nńĀ Wehewehe a/a i  Ľole NńĀ Ho Ľoponopono i Mana Ľo  Ľia e like me kńĀu NńĀ  ĽŇĆlelo A Ľo AI.
settings.privacy_button: ĽIke pilikino a me ka mńĀlama  Ľikepili
settings.privacy_heading: Pilikino a me ka mńĀlama  Ľikepili
settings.privacy_subhead_storage: He Aha kńĀ Mea i MńĀlama  Ľia
settings.privacy_body_1: I kńďia manawa, mńĀlama  Ľia nńĀ mea ńĀpau ma loko o kńĀu kńĀko Ľo pŇęnaewele me ka ho Ľohana  Ľana i localStorage.  ĽA Ľohe mea e ho Ľouna  Ľia ana ińĀ mńĀkou a i  Ľole i kekahi kikowaena.  ĽO nńĀ  Ľikepili i mńĀlama  Ľia: ke  Ľano hŇć Ľike,  ĽŇćlelo, ka  ĽŇćnaehana kńĀnana kahua, ka ho Ľonohonoho Huli Ola, ka makemake AI provider, nńĀ kńę API, nńĀ paepae, nńĀ hŇćkŇę, nńĀ mea waihona, nńĀ mea pini, nńĀ  Ľike hou, nńĀ  Ľike ma Ľamau, nńĀ ho Ľololi corpus pilikino, a me kńĀu  Ľike i wehe hope  Ľia.
settings.privacy_body_2: MńĀlama  Ľia nńĀ kńę API ma loko o kńĀu kńĀko Ľo pŇęnaewele wale nŇć a ho Ľouna pololei  Ľia i ka AI provider ńĀu i ho Ľonohonoho ai.  ĽA Ľole loa mńĀkou e  Ľike a i  Ľole e loa Ľa ińĀ mńĀkou ia mau mea. Hiki ińĀ  Ľoe ke wehe ińĀ lńĀkou i kńďlńĀ me kńďia manawa mai nńĀ koina AI ma lalo nei, a i  Ľole ma ka holoi  Ľana i ka  Ľikepili kahua pŇęnaewele o kńďia  Ľao Ľao.
settings.privacy_body_translations: Ua unuhi  Ľia nńĀ unuhi UI a me ka corpus lehulehu kumu me ka AI a hiki ke loa Ľa nńĀ hewa.  ĽA Ľole loa e ho Ľouna  Ľia nńĀ  Ľikepili i komo  Ľia e ka mea ho Ľohana, nńĀ  Ľike ma Ľamau, a i  Ľole nńĀ ho Ľololi pilikino no ka unuhi.
settings.save: E MńĀlama i nńĀ Ho Ľololi
settings.reduced_motion_note: Ho Ľohuli  Ľia ka  Ľoni hŇć Ľemi. Prena  Ľia nńĀ  Ľoni e like me ka confetti. No ka ho ĽŇćla hou  Ľana, e ho Ľopau i ka  Ľoni hŇć Ľemi ma nńĀ koina kŇćkua kino o kńĀu OS.

notfound.body: ĽA Ľole e loa Ľa kńďia  Ľao Ľao. E ho Ľi aku i ka  Ľao Ľao home.
party.banner: ~*~ KE  ĽANO PńÄ ĽINA UA HO ĽńÄ  ĽIA ~*~
party.play: Ho Ľokani i ka mele pńĀ Ľina
party.stop: Ho ĽŇćki i ka mele pńĀ Ľina
party.announce_full: Ua ho ĽńĀ  Ľia ke  Ľano pńĀ Ľina! Ua loli ka hua palapala i Comic Sans. Ua loli nńĀ waiho Ľolu Ľu i kahi papa waiho Ľolu Ľu  ĽŇćlinolino  ĽŇćpiopio. Ke haule nei nńĀ confetti waiho Ľolu Ľu mai luna o ka pale i nńĀ waiho Ľolu Ľu a me nńĀ hi Ľohi Ľona like  Ľole. He koolau kupanaha ka i Ľoa  Ľumeke i kńďia manawa.
party.announce_reduced: Ua ho ĽńĀ  Ľia ke  Ľano pńĀ Ľina! Ua loli ka hua palapala i Comic Sans. Ua loli nńĀ waiho Ľolu Ľu i kahi papa waiho Ľolu Ľu  ĽŇćlinolino  ĽŇćpiopio. He koolau kupanaha ka i Ľoa  Ľumeke i kńďia manawa. Ua  Ľalu Ľalu  Ľia nńĀ confetti no ka mea ua ho ĽńĀ  Ľia ka hŇć Ľemi ne Ľe.
kofi.aria: KŇćkua ińĀ Mikey ma Ko-fi (wehe  Ľia ka pahu)
kofi.title: Ko-fi haawi widget
header.open_about: E pili ana i kńďia polokalamu
about.what_body: He waihona kńďia o nńĀ  Ľike kŇćkua kino no nńĀ loiloi lima. E huli i kńĀu mea i  Ľike ai, e loa Ľa i kahi wehewehe kŇępono, a e kope i loko o kńĀu hŇć Ľike.
about.what_wcag: Uhi ana kńďia  Ľikepili i WCAG 2.2 pae A a me AA, ka lula i ho Ľohana nui  Ľia e ka hapa nui o nńĀ hui a me ke kumu o nńĀ kńĀnńĀwai kŇćkua kino he nui. He uhi pŇę  Ľia kekahi mau Criterion KŇć Ľike Pae AAA i ka wahi e mana Ľo laulńĀ ai ka hui kŇćkua kino he ko Ľiko Ľi ka hewa.
about.step_1_body: E pa Ľi i kńĀu mea i  Ľike  Ľia ‚ÄĒ inoa o ka mea hana,  Ľano  Ľano, a i  Ľole wehewehe ma Ľamau.
about.step_2_body: E ho Ľohana i nńĀ pua Ho Ľonui Kohu/Ho Ľoha Ľaha Ľa Kohu ma kńďlńĀ me kńďia hopena e ho Ľonohonoho ai i ka papa kuhikuhi. E hŇćkeo e hŇć Ľike mua. E ho Ľopa Ľa i ka waihona e hŇęnńĀ.
about.step_3_body: E koho i ka loa Ľa e like ana me kńĀu  Ľike. Ho Ľonohonoho  Ľia nńĀ hopena ma ka pili.
about.step_4_body: E ho Ľohui i kahi unlapi wahi (e la Ľa, "Holo Ľoko Ľa:") a i  Ľole e ho Ľohana i ka AI e kŇćkua i ka ho Ľoponopono  ĽŇćlelo.
about.feature_ai_body: E ho Ľohana i ka AI e kńĀkau hou ai i kahi  Ľike e like me kńĀu mau memo. E lawe mai i kńĀu kńę API pono Ľńę mai Anthropic, OpenAI, a i  Ľole Google. E noho ana ia i loko o kńĀu kńĀko Ľo pŇęnaewele a  Ľa Ľole loa e ho Ľouna  Ľia ińĀ mńĀkou. E ho Ľonohonoho i loko o
about.feature_languages_body: Loa Ľa kńďia waihona ma luna o 50 mau  ĽŇćlelo me ka kńĀko Ľo RTL no nńĀ  ĽŇćlelo hema-a-hema. He aloha a he mana Ľo ko Ľiko Ľi ko Ľu no ka  ĽŇćlelo, ka mo Ľomeheu, a me ka  Ľepekema  ĽŇćlelo. He huaka Ľi  Ľao Ľao ka ho Ľohui  Ľana i kńďia mau  ĽŇćlelo ńĀpau, he hńĀ Ľawi ho ĽńĀ Ľo, he lua lohia, he nalowale pŇę o ka mana Ľo no kekahi manawa. Ua hana AI i nńĀ unuhi, no laila e ho Ľomana Ľo mau ai no ia mea i nńĀ kuhi unuhi. E aloha  Ľia nńĀ ho Ľoponopono. E ho Ľololi i loko o
about.feature_party_body: Aia ma nńĀ ho Ľonohonoho. Ma lalo o ka  Ľano.  ĽIke  Ľoe i ka  Ľike  Ľana.
about.feature_a11y_label: KŇćkua Kino Mua a me AI  ĽAlua
about.feature_a11y_body: KŇękulu  Ľia e like me WCAG 2.2. Komo ana ka ho Ľoponopono focus, nńĀ wahi ola, ka ho Ľokele piha keyboard, ke kńĀko Ľo  Ľoni hŇć Ľemi, a me nńĀ kiko waiho Ľolu Ľu ki Ľeki Ľe- Ľoko Ľa.
about.coming_auth: E komo koho me Google a i  Ľole GitHub e ho Ľonohonoho i kńĀu mau ho Ľonohonoho ma nńĀ mea.
about.coming_custom: Ho Ľohui a ho Ľoponopono i kńĀu mau loiloi iho, i mńĀlama  Ľia me ka malu ma ke ao.
about.coming_ai: NńĀ mea ho Ľolako AI hou: OpenAI, Google Gemini, a me nńĀ mea hou.
settings.reset_all: E Ho Ľiho Ľi i nńĀ Koina & E Holoi i nńĀ  ĽIkepili
settings.confirm_reset_all_heading: E Ho Ľiho Ľi i nńĀ Koina a me ka Holoi  Ľana i nńĀ  ĽIkepili
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: E holoi ia i nńĀ ho Ľonohonoho ńĀpau ‚ÄĒ me nńĀ kńę API ‚ÄĒ a ho Ľiho Ľi i nńĀ waiwai ma Ľamau.  ĽA Ľole hiki ke ho Ľiho Ľi.
settings.confirm_reset_all_yes: ĽAe, e ho Ľiho Ľi i nńĀ mea ńĀpau

settings.unsaved_body: He mau ho Ľololi mńĀlama  Ľole kńĀu. He aha kńĀu makemake e hana ai?

about.step_5_body: E kope i ka wehewehe a me nńĀ  Ľanu Ľu ho Ľoponopono pololei i loko o kńĀu papa helu a i  Ľole hŇć Ľike.
about.examples_intro: ĽO nńĀ la Ľana,  Ľo ia ho Ľi:

detail.revise_error_body: Ua hewa kekahi mea i ka ho Ľoponopono. E kaomi i MńĀlama & Ho Ľoponopono i NńĀ Koho e ho ĽńĀ Ľo hou.
settings.api_key_error: Hewa: Koi  Ľia ka kńę API ke hana  Ľia ka AI KŇćkua.
error.heading: Ua Hewa Kekahi Mea
error.body: ĽA Ľole hiki ke ho Ľouka i ka waihona loiloi. E nńĀnńĀ i kńĀu pilina a
settings.no_changes_body: ĽA Ľohe mea e mńĀlama ai.
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: He kńę API  Ľole pono a i  Ľole ua pau ka manawa ({provider}). E nńĀnńĀ hou i kńĀu kńę ma NńĀ Koikoi Ľike.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Ua hiki i ka palena nui ({provider}). E kali kekahi manawa a ho ĽńĀ Ľo hou.
detail.revise_error_service_error: Hewa ka lawelawe {provider} ({status}). E ho ĽńĀ Ľo hou ma hope o nńĀ sekona.
detail.revise_error_network_error: ĽA Ľohe pŇęnaewele. E nńĀnńĀ i kńĀu pilina a ho ĽńĀ Ľo hou.
settings.reset_all_announce: Ho Ľiho Ľi  Ľia nńĀ Koina ńÄpau a Holoi  Ľia nńĀ  ĽIkepili.
about.what_body_2: He mea ko Ľiko Ľi ka like like,  Ľoi aku ho Ľi ma kńďia  Ľoihana, a makemake au e ho Ľopa Ľa i ko Ľu like like me ka nui o ka hopena, ka ko Ľiko Ľi, nńĀ wehewehe, a me nńĀ  Ľanu Ľu ho Ľoponopono  Ľenehana i mana Ľo  Ľia e like ana. E huli i kńďia waihona hana home o nńĀ palapala loa Ľa i ho Ľopili  Ľia i WCAG, e koho i kekahi e like ana me kńĀu  Ľike, e ho Ľololi a e ho Ľohui i nńĀ kiko Ľńę, a e kope/ho Ľopili pololei i loko o kńĀu hŇć Ľike loiloi.
error.announce: Ua hewa kekahi mea.  ĽA Ľole i hiki ke ho Ľouka  Ľia ka waihona  Ľike. E nńĀnńĀ i kńĀu pilina a e ho ĽńĀ Ľo hou.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: E kope i ka wehewehe a me ka ho Ľoponopono i mana Ľo  Ľia i ka manawa ho Ľokahi
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: E ho Ľiho Ľi i ka wehewehe a me ka ho Ľoponopono i mana Ľo  Ľia i nńĀ waiwai kumu
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only ‚ÄĒ switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually ‚ÄĒ translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
results.unpin_all: Wehe i nńĀ Ho Ľopinni ńÄpau
settings.pinned_results_label: NńĀ Hopena i Pa Ľa  Ľia
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.pinned_results_empty: ĽA Ľohe mea i pa Ľa  Ľia.
settings.unpin_all: Wehe i NńĀ Pa Ľa a Pau
settings.unpin_all_done: Ua Wehea NńĀ Pa Ľa a Pau
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: E loa Ľa ana nńĀ ho Ľolaha mai nńĀ hui o ka lńĀhui kŇępono a me ka lńĀhui mea ho Ľomohala. MńĀlama  Ľia kńĀu pilikino,  Ľa Ľohe  Ľimi hahai,  Ľa Ľohe kiko Ľńę,  Ľa Ľohe algorithm.
onboarding.heading: E komo mai i A11yFred
onboarding.done_aria: Ho Ľopau i ka huaka Ľi
onboarding.confirm_heading: E pani i ka huaka Ľi?
onboarding.confirm_body: Ua hiki  Ľole ińĀ  Ľoe i ka hopena o ka huaka Ľi. E pani a preki i ke koena?
onboarding.slide_1_body: E wehewehe i kńĀu i  Ľike ai: he inoa  ĽńĀpana, hŇć Ľailona, a i  Ľole he pa Ľi kŇęle Ľa WCAG. E ho Ľohana i nńĀ kńĀnana Platform a me WCAG Level e ho Ľohaiki ai i ka waihona. E ho Ľohana i Narrow Results e kńĀnana ai i loko o ka mea i hŇć Ľike  Ľia. Ho Ľonohonoho  Ľia nńĀ hopena ma ke ko Ľiko Ľi, a laila ma ka ikaika.
onboarding.slide_2_body: E ho Ľohana i Rank Up/Down e ho Ľonohonoho ai i nńĀ hopena ma ke ko Ľiko Ľi. E hŇćkŇę i kahi loa Ľa e hŇć Ľike mau ai ia ma mua. E ho Ľopa Ľa i kahi loa Ľa e mau ai ia ma luna i nńĀ huli ńĀpau.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Wehe i kahi  Ľike e nńĀnńĀ i kona inoa, ke kumu WCAG, ka wehewehe, a me ka ho Ľoponopono i mana Ľo  Ľia. Ho Ľohui i kahi  ĽŇćlelo wahi ma ke kahua wehewehe (e.g. 'Global:'). E ho Ľohana i ke AI Assist e ho Ľololi i kńďlńĀ me kńďia kahua me kńĀu mau memo, a laila kope i nńĀ kahua o kńďlńĀ me kńďia ho Ľokahi a i  Ľole ho Ľohana i ke Copy All e lawe i nńĀ mea ńĀpau i ho Ľokahi manawa.
search.narrow_clear_aria: Holoi i ka kńĀnana haiki a ho Ľiho Ľi

results.skip_to_next: Lele i ka hopena a Ľe
results.sort_live_hint: Ke hana nei ka Huli Ola. E ho Ľonohonoho koke ana nńĀ hopena ma hope o ka ho Ľokomo  Ľana a i  Ľole ka ho Ľololi  Ľana i ka koho.
results.summary_query: Ke hŇć Ľike nei i nńĀ hualoa Ľa no '{query}', i ho Ľonohonoho  Ľia e '{sort}', i hŇć Ľu Ľuku  Ľia e '{narrow}', {platform}.
results.summary_no_query: Ho Ľonohonoho  Ľia e '{sort}', hŇć Ľu Ľuku  Ľia e '{narrow}', {platform}.
results.summary_no_narrow: Ke hŇć Ľike nei i nńĀ hualoa Ľa no '{query}', i ho Ľonohonoho  Ľia e '{sort}', {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: Ho Ľonohonoho  Ľo Smart e ka nui o ka pŇć Ľino mua, a laila e kńĀu helu koho pilikino. E hŇć Ľike mau ana nńĀ mea i hŇćkŇę  Ľia i luna; e hŇć Ľike mau ana nńĀ mea i ho Ľopa Ľa  Ľia i lalo.  ĽO kńďia ka ho Ľonohonoho pa Ľamau.
results.sort_severity_desc: PŇć Ľino: Ki Ľeki Ľe a i ka Hana Maika Ľi
results.sort_severity_asc: PŇć Ľino: Hana Maika Ľi a i ka Ki Ľeki Ľe
results.sort_sc: SC i hńĀ Ľule ai (Ha Ľaha Ľa a Ki Ľeki Ľe)
results.sort_wcag_level_info: He koho ka kńĀko Ľo  Ľana i nńĀ criterion AAA ma kńďia pŇę Ľulu.  ĽA Ľole i hŇć Ľike  Ľia nńĀ criterion kŇęle Ľa AAA ńĀpau, a  Ľo kekahi mau komo i hŇć Ľailona  Ľia he AAA paha e hŇć Ľike ana i nńĀ a Ľoa Ľo hana maika Ľi ma mua o nńĀ pahuhopu kŇęlike pa Ľa.
results.sort_popularity_info: I kekahi ho Ľonui e hiki mai ana, e hŇć Ľike ana kńďia i ka kaulana honua i hŇć Ľulu Ľulu  Ľia ma muli o nńĀ pilina mea ho Ľohana ma nńĀ mo ĽokńĀki ńĀpau. I kńďia manawa, ho Ľomaka hou ka kaulana i kńďlńĀ me kńďia hńĀlńĀwai a e ho Ľiho Ľi  Ľia ka helu ke pani  Ľoe i ka polokalamu.
results.narrow_title: Ko Ľoko Ľo hou i kńďia mau hopena
results.rank_hint: Ho Ľonui a ho Ľoha Ľaha Ľa i nńĀ hopena e ho Ľonohonoho ai. HŇćkŇę e hŇć Ľike mua ai. Ho Ľopa Ľa e hŇęnńĀ ai. (Hiki ke ho Ľiho Ľi.)

results.unpin_from_search: Ua ho Ľopinni  Ľia kńďia hopena. E wehe i ka ho Ľopinni e ho Ľopili ai i nńĀ hopena huli.

detail.ai_revision_hint: E koho i nńĀ kahua e ho Ľololi ai me nńĀ pahu hŇć Ľoia ma luna, e ho Ľohui i kńĀu mau memo ma ane Ľi, a e kńĀkau hou ai ka AI i ia mau kahua. E ho Ľololi i ke kńĀkua ĽńĀina AI a i  Ľole e ho Ľopau, e hele i
detail.finding_note_hint: E ho Ľohui i ka pŇć Ľaiapili ma ane Ľi: wahi, nńĀ memo nui, a i  Ľole nńĀ mea pili i ka papahana. E hŇć Ľano i ka AI Assist ma
detail.finding_note_hint_suffix: a e kńĀkau hou  Ľia ma muli o kńĀu mau memo.
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: e.g. pili kńďia i ka mobile, he tooltip ka mea
detail.finding_note_placeholder: e.g. Nui loa ka ko Ľiko Ľi, loa Ľa ma ke ka Ľina Onboarding a pau. Hiki ke  Ľike  Ľia nńĀ pilikia ha Ľaha Ľa ke ho Ľoponopono  Ľia kńďlńĀ mau mea.
detail.ai_revised_desc_checkbox: E ho Ľololi i ka Wehewehe
detail.ai_revised_fix_checkbox: E ho Ľololi i ka Ho Ľoponopono i Mana Ľo  Ľia
detail.ai_revision_save_text: E MńĀlama & Ho Ľololi i nńĀ Mea i Koho  Ľia
detail.ai_revision_aria: E mńĀlama i nńĀ  ĽŇćlelo a Ľo AI a ho Ľololi i nńĀ kahua i koho  Ľia
detail.ai_revision_error_heading: Ua HńĀ Ľule ka Ho Ľololi AI
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Ua hewa kekahi mea i ka ho Ľololi  Ľana. E kaomi i E MńĀlama & Ho Ľololi i nńĀ Mea i Koho  Ľia e ho ĽńĀ Ľo hou.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: ĽA Ľole kŇę pono a i  Ľole ua pau ka API key ({provider}). E nńĀnńĀ hou i kńĀu kńę ma NńĀ Koike Ľano.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Ua hiki i ka palena rate ({provider}). E kali iki a ho ĽńĀ Ľo hou.
detail.ai_revision_error_service_error: Hewa ka lawelawe {provider} ({status}). E ho ĽńĀ Ľo hou i loko o nńĀ sekona  Ľelua a  Ľekolu paha.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: ĽA Ľohe pilina pŇęnaewele. E nńĀnńĀ i kńĀu pilina a ho ĽńĀ Ľo hou.
detail.ai_revision_error_api_error: Hewa i mana Ľo  Ľole  Ľia mai {provider} mai (HTTP {status}).
help.take_tour: E Lawe i ka Huaka Ľi
help.take_tour_description: E huli hou i ka huaka Ľi ho Ľomaka e nńĀnńĀ hou i ke  Ľano hana o A11yFred.
help.how_heading: Me Pehea e Ho Ľohana Ai
help.step_1_body: HŇć Ľike  Ľia nńĀ hopena i kou kńĀkau  Ľana. E ho Ľohana i ka lula Platform ma Settings e koho ai i nńĀ loa Ľa no ka Web a i  Ľole ka Native App (ka hapa nui no ka web). E ho Ľohana i +hua ĽŇćlelo e koi i kahi hua ĽŇćlelo a me -hua ĽŇćlelo e wehe aku (p.l. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: He mau pihi Rank Up a me Rank Down ko kńďlńĀ me kńďia hopena e ho Ľololi ai i kona ka Ľina. E ho Ľokalahea i kahi hopena e hŇć Ľike mua ai ia. E ho Ľopa Ľa i kahi hopena e noho mau ai ma luna ma nńĀ huli ńĀpau.
help.step_3_body: E koho i ka loa Ľa e ho Ľopili ana i kńĀu i nńĀnńĀ ai. Ho Ľonohonoho  Ľia nńĀ hopena ma ka pili mua, a laila ma ka ikaika o ka pilikia.
help.step_4_body: Ho Ľohui i kahi  ĽŇćlelo wahi ma ke kahua wehewehe (e.g. 'Global:' a i  Ľole 'Cart:'). InńĀ aia ke AI Assist, e ho Ľohui i kńĀu mau memo i ke kahua Revision Notes a e kńĀkau hou  Ľo AI i ka  Ľike e pili ana i kńĀu pŇć Ľaiapili.
help.step_5_body: E kope i ka wehewehe a me ka ho Ľoponopono i mana Ľo  Ľia i loko o kńĀu pepa helu a i  Ľole hŇć Ľike. E ho Ľohana i Copy All e lawe ai i nńĀ kahua  Ľelua i ka manawa ho Ľokahi.
help.shortcuts_note: ĽAno nui wale nŇć nńĀ pŇćkole i ka wńĀ e noho ana ka nńĀnńĀ  Ľana ma ka papa hopena. E ho Ľohana ińĀ lńĀkou e ne Ľe wikiwiki ai a e helu ai i nńĀ loa Ľa me ka ha Ľalele  Ľole i ka papa.
help.shortcut_s: S = Ho Ľokalahea i ka hopena i koho  Ľia
help.shortcut_e: E = WaihŇć i ka hopena i koho  Ľia
help.shortcut_u: U = Ho Ľiho Ľi i ka hopena waihŇć  Ľia
help.shortcut_rank_up: Shift + ‚ÜĎ = Ho Ľoki Ľeki Ľe i ka hopena i koho  Ľia
help.shortcut_rank_down: Shift + ‚Üď = Ho Ľoha Ľaha Ľa i ka hopena i koho  Ľia
about.what_body_2_prefix: Puka pinepine nńĀ pilikia like i kńďlńĀ me kńďia pŇęnaewele. MńĀlama kńďia mea hana i kńĀu mau wehewehe e like mau ai ma nńĀ hŇć Ľike ńĀpau i  Ľole e kńĀkau hou ai mai ka ho Ľomaka  Ľana i kńďlńĀ me kńďia manawa. KŇękulu  Ľia ka waihona mai ka hana loiloi maoli aku, a laila ho Ľomaika Ľi  Ľia me ka AI no ka  ĽŇćlelo maopopo, ke kŇęlike, ka pololei, a me ka nńĀnńĀ  Ľia i ka
about.feature_agentic_label: Ho Ľopili i ka  ĽAno KńĀkau Mau
about.feature_agentic_body: InńĀ ho Ľohana  Ľoe i Claude (Anthropic), hiki nŇć ho Ľi ińĀ  Ľoe ke ho ĽńĀla i ka Match Existing Style. E huli ka AI i nńĀ la Ľana ho Ľololi o ka wńĀ i hala e ho Ľopili ai i ke  Ľano a me ka loloa ńĀu i ho Ľokumu ai,  Ľa Ľole e kńĀkau hou wale i ka loa Ľa i koho  Ľia.
about.examples_ath001_label: Pihi a i  Ľole Loulou i Kapa  Ľole  Ľia
about.examples_ath010_label: Wehewehe ka Pailaka Mana i ke  ĽAno,  ĽA Ľole i ka Mea i Ho Ľohana  Ľia
about.examples_ath014_label: ĽA Ľohe H1 ma ka  ĽAo Ľao
about.examples_ath019_label: ARIA i Ho Ľohana Hewa  Ľia
settings.party_confirm_heading: E ho ĽńĀla i ke  Ľano pńĀ Ľina?
settings.party_confirm_body: E lilo ana nńĀ mea i  Ľńď loa a hiki paha ke kŇęlike  Ľole.
settings.pending_save_note: {unsaved} E kaomi i ka pihi {save} e ho Ľohana ai.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Hana  Ľia kńďia unuhi e ka AI a  Ľa Ľole i nńĀnńĀ  Ľia e nńĀ mea  ĽŇćlelo Rohingya maoli.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Ho Ľomanawanui ka po Ľe Rohingya i ka luku kanaka a me ka kipaku pŇć Ľino. E ho Ľohana pono i kńďia unuhi, a e no Ľono Ľo e hńĀ Ľawi i nńĀ ho Ľoponopono inńĀ hiki ińĀ  Ľoe.
settings.language_rhg_use_anyway: E ho Ľohana nŇć na Ľe
settings.platform_all_desc: HŇć Ľike i nńĀ hopena ńĀpau ma ka web, nńĀ polokalamu maoli, a me nńĀ palapala.

settings.starred_results_desc: Pi Ľi mau nńĀ mea i hŇć Ľailona hŇćkŇę  Ľia a hiki i ka piko, ma ke ka Ľina i hŇć Ľailona hŇćkŇę  Ľia ai.
